name: daisy-default
description: DaisyUI + Tailwind component library (Astro 6, Preact, Reveal.js)

notes.SlidingGallery: props.dataid loading not yet implemented; use props.items[] for inline data
notes.CTARemote: requires datatool.url and datatool.websiteid in website.config.cjs
notes.Video: serves HLS via props.videoUrl; props.posterImage optional
